title: Ram Chalisa
intro: A devotional hymn dedicated to Lord Rama, conveying righteousness, dharma and devotion.
description:
|| Shri Ram Chalisa ||
(The full verses of the Ram Chalisa will be added here.)
meaning: This Chalisa praises the glory of Lord Rama and his ideal way of life.

faq.q1: When should I recite Ram Chalisa?
faq.a1: Daily in the morning, and especially on Ram Navami.
faq.q2: Can it be recited in any language?
faq.a2: Yes, devotion matters more than language.
